metadata.title: Dualys | Strategic Consultancy for the Defense Sector
metadata.description: We build dual-use capabilities for industry. We facilitate the entry of industrial and technology companies into the European defense sector.

hero.title: Your company has what the defense sector needs. We help you get there.
hero.subtitle: DUALYS is the bridge between the industrial and technological capability of Spanish companies — with an initial emphasis on Catalan firms — and European dual-use markets. We accelerate your entry into the defense sector with expertise, methodology, and a real network of contacts.
hero.contextNote: Europe has committed over 800,000 M€ to defense through 2030. The time to position yourself is now.

context.title: Why now
context.paragraph1: Europe is undergoing a structural transformation in defense. Readiness Europe 2030 mobilizes up to 800,000 million euros in procurement and projects aimed at strengthening the European Defense Technological and Industrial Base (EDTIB). In Spain, the Industrial Security and Defense Plan is already active with a 44,000 million euro allocation for the coming years and the policy of reaching and maintaining 2% of GDP in defense investment.
context.paragraph2: Spain has a world-class industrial and technological ecosystem: leading companies in automotive, aeronautics, composites, electronics, artificial intelligence, robotics, and cybersecurity. Capabilities that the defense sector needs right now to build more resilient supply chains of European origin.
context.paragraph3: The problem is not a lack of potential. Most SMEs and Catalan technology companies are unfamiliar with the entry mechanisms, the required certifications, or the defense market circuits. That is exactly what DUALYS solves.
context.stat2Label: Spain's Industrial Security and Defense Plan

industrial.title: For manufacturers
industrial.description: Component manufacturers, precision manufacturing, automotive, aeronautics, composites, industrial electronics.

tech.cta: See how we work with tech companies

primes.title: For major primes
primes.description: Defense sector companies that need to expand their supply chain with qualified local capability.

message1.title: The time is now
message1.text: Europe has committed hundreds of billions to defense and technological sovereignty. Spain's Industrial Security and Defense Plan is already active. Companies that position themselves now will gain a structural advantage.

message2.title: Spain and Catalonia are ready, but alignment is missing
message2.text: Spain has world-class technology, industry, and talent. The problem is not potential: it is the disconnect between that potential and the rules of the game in the sector.

message3.title: We are a consultancy that adds real value to your business
message3.text: We do not produce reports that end up in a drawer. We accelerate market entry, reduce risk, and open real commercial doors.

message4.title: Your civil technology is already a competitive advantage in defense
message4.text: If you manufacture precision parts for the automotive industry, you can manufacture them for ground or naval platforms. DUALYS helps you see that transfer and make it operational.

message5.title: We reduce the risk of transition
message5.text: The defense sector has specific regulations (AQAP/PECAL, RID, EN9100, ISO 27001, ITAR, export controls). DUALYS diagnoses first, plans second, and executes with expertise.

verticals.title: Defense verticals
verticals.subtitle: Discover which defense sector areas your company can position itself in
verticals.cta: Discover which vertical fits your company

uav.title: UAV / UGV / USV
uav.description: Robotics, machine vision, applied AI, drones

team.title: The team
team.text: The founding team of DUALYS combines profiles rarely found together: executive experience in security and defense institutions, top-level political career with deep knowledge of the Spanish — and particularly the Catalan — business ecosystem, technical and commercial expertise in international industrial and defense projects, and the ability to orchestrate innovation ecosystems and complex value chains. Together, we cover the four pillars required for a successful dual-use transition: sector knowledge, business development, institutional access, and executive capability.

cta.title: Building dual-use capabilities for industry.
cta.subtitle: In 2 sessions we give you a clear assessment, an opportunity map, and an action plan.

meta.title: About Us | Team and Vision | Dualys
meta.description: DUALYS was born from the conviction that Spain has the ingredients to become a European benchmark in industrial and technological dual-use.

nosotros.title: About Us
nosotros.subtitle: Strategic accelerators for the dual-use transition

narrative.paragraph1: DUALYS was born from a conviction: Spain has the ingredients to become a European benchmark in industrial and technological dual-use. World-class technology, robust industry, an innovative ecosystem, and internationally recognized talent. What was missing was someone to align that potential with the rules of the game in the defense market.
narrative.paragraph2: Recently founded but with extensive experience gained over years, DUALYS is that player. We are not a conventional consultancy or an intermediary. We are strategic accelerators: we help industrial, technology, and software companies understand the defense sector, position themselves within it, and secure their first real contracts. With a proven methodology, a team with top-level experience, and a network of contacts built over years in institutions, sector companies, and European organizations.
narrative.vision: Our ten-year vision: for Spain to be one of Europe's leading hubs for dual-use innovation and production, with dozens of companies serving as strategic suppliers to the major European defense programs and as a dual-use acceleration hub for Europe.

profile1.title: Institutional vision and security
profile1.text: One of the founders brings a senior management career in public security and Catalan institutions. He has led security agencies at the highest executive level and possesses deep knowledge of how administrations function and how decisions are made in sensitive environments.

profile2.title: Strategy and political-institutional knowledge and business ecosystem
profile2.text: Another founder provides the strategic vision required for this sector. He has held top-level political leadership positions in Catalan institutions, with direct responsibility over industrial policy, enterprise, and labor. His access to institutional, business, and public funding networks is a strategic differentiator for DUALYS.

profile3.title: Technical-industrial expertise and international operations
profile3.text: The team includes a profile with direct experience in building and scaling companies at the intersection of industry and cutting-edge technology. His experience in business development, project execution, certification processes, complex supply chains, and entrepreneurial vision is the backbone of DUALYS's support methodology.

profile4.title: Defense commercialization and business development
profile4.text: The fourth founding team profile is the commercial engine of DUALYS. With specific experience in business development focused on the defense sector, he knows the channels, the timelines, the stakeholders, and the sales dynamics in a market that operates in a radically different way from standard B2B commerce.

phase1.title: Phase 1 — The Awakening (2025-2026)
phase1.text: Identify and activate the latent dual-use potential in the Catalan ecosystem. Help the first 20-30 companies take the step.

phase2.title: Phase 2 — The Acceleration (2027-2028)
phase2.text: Build an interconnected dual-use ecosystem. Facilitate alliances between Catalan startups and major European corporations. Attract specialized investment.

phase3.title: Phase 3 — The Leadership (2029-2030)
phase3.text: Spain as a leading European hub for dual-use innovation and production. Export the model to other regions. Connect the Spanish ecosystem with global opportunities.

meta.title: Privacy Policy | Dualys
meta.description: Dualys privacy policy explaining how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.content: Dualys AIE ("we", "our", or "us") is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, disclose, and safeguard your information when you visit our website.

dataCollection.title: Information We Collect
dataCollection.content: We collect information that you voluntarily provide when you contact us through our website, including your name, company, email address, sector, and a description of your challenge.

dataUse.title: How We Use Your Information
dataUse.content: We use the information we collect to respond to your inquiries, provide you with information about our services, and improve our website and services.

dataSharing.title: Information Sharing
dataSharing.content: We do not sell, trade, or otherwise transfer your personal information to third parties without your consent, except as required by law or to service providers who assist us in operating our website.

dataSecurity.title: Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorized access, alteration, disclosure, or destruction.

yourRights.title: Your Rights
yourRights.content: Under GDPR, you have the right to access, rectify, erase, restrict processing, and port your personal data. You also have the right to object to processing and to withdraw consent at any time.

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content: Our website uses cookies to enhance your experience. Please refer to our Cookie Policy for more information.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at info@dualys.eu.

meta.title: Legal Notice | Dualys
meta.description: Legal notice and terms of use for the Dualys website.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing and using this website, you accept and agree to be bound by these Terms of Use. If you do not agree to these terms, please do not use this website.

use.title: Use of Website
use.content: This website is provided for informational purposes about Dualys and its services. You may use this website only for lawful purposes and in accordance with these Terms.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual Property
intellectualProperty.content: All content on this website, including text, graphics, logos, and images, is the property of Dualys or its content suppliers and is protected by intellectual property laws.

disclaimers.title: Disclaimers
disclaimers.content: This website and its content are provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. Dualys does not warrant that the website will be uninterrupted or error-free.

limitation.title: Limitation of Liability
limitation.content: Dualys shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages arising from your use of this website.

governingLaw.title: Governing Law
governingLaw.content: These Terms shall be governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Spain and the European Union. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Barcelona.

contact.title: Contact
contact.content: For questions about this Legal Notice, please contact us at info@dualys.eu.

meta.title: Cookie Policy | Dualys
meta.description: Information about how Dualys uses cookies on its website.

whatAreCookies.title: What Are Cookies?
whatAreCookies.content: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and to provide information to website owners.

howWeUse.title: How We Use Cookies
howWeUse.content: We use cookies to understand how you interact with our website, to remember your preferences, and to improve your overall experience.

types.title: Types of Cookies We Use
types.content:
Essential Cookies: Required for the website to function properly.
Analytics Cookies: Help us understand how visitors interact with our website.
Preference Cookies: Remember your settings and preferences.

manage.title: Managing Cookies
manage.content: You can control and manage cookies through your browser settings. Please note that removing or blocking cookies may impact your experience on our website.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.content: If you have questions about our use of cookies, please contact us at info@dualys.eu.
